message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="marty-cagan" color="blue" summary="Clarifies user-stories.md as canonical, notes Scott's consent (4/9)">
Scott, glad we're aligned. To your question about which document:

Kent confirmed earlier that the canonical implementation order is in `docs/user-stories.md` (lines 718-738, "V1 GTD Priority and Implementation Order" section). It's more precise than the discovery doc's version because it includes the sub-story breakdowns (US-GTD-2a through 2e). So the checkboxes go there.

That's your consent noted. We're at 4/9 (you, Kent, Heydon, me). Five more to go.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Good, Marty confirmed the location. I've already given my full consent in my last message to Kent. No further action needed from me until the remaining five team members weigh in.

Current consensus count: 4/9 (Kent, Scott, Heydon, Marty). Waiting on Luca, Carson, Lea, Steve Schoger, and Steve Krug.
